calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2017 Off Calendar

Motion For Defaupt Prove-Up
Off Calendar Apr-04-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Robert McKendrick on behalf of Plaintiff BMO Harris Bank N.A. a National Association.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant David Poghosyan an individual.
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $146,534.52
Pre-Judgment Interest: $15,819.10
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $649.90
Late charges: $1,074.32
Total Judgment in the amount of $166,902.84

Also for possession of One 2015 Kenworth T-680 Series, Serial No. 1XKYDP9XXFJ443344; One 2008 Utility Refrigerated Vans: 53', Serial No. 1UYVS25398U324715; One 2015 Thermo King Reefer SB210, Serial No. 6001010995 and upon recovery a credit will be applied to the judgment amount owing

Judgment signed in open court.

Motion For Defaupt Prove-Up
Off Calendar Mar-02-2017 Continued To Apr-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-09-2016 Continued To Apr-26-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
